mode.title: Mode
mode.description: Run mode: post, snapshot, both, or webhook.

content_pieces_db.title: Content Pieces DB
content_pieces_db.description: Notion database ID for Content Pieces. Defaults to Sol's database.

snapshots_db.title: Snapshots DB
snapshots_db.description: Notion database ID for Post Snapshots. Defaults to Sol's database.

tenant.title: Tenant
tenant.description: Tenant identifier used to namespace KV store board keys (e.g. sol, olive). Defaults to sol.

pinterest_access_token.title: Pinterest Access Token
pinterest_access_token.description: Pinterest OAuth access token. Falls back to PINTEREST_ACCESS_TOKEN env var if omitted.

pinterest_refresh_token.title: Pinterest Refresh Token
pinterest_refresh_token.description: Pinterest OAuth refresh token. Falls back to PINTEREST_REFRESH_TOKEN env var if omitted.

notion_access_token.title: Notion Access Token
notion_access_token.description: Notion integration token. Falls back to NOTION_ACCESS_TOKEN env var if omitted.
